memberdef.name: mux_gpios
memberdef.initializer: = { {.port = DEVICE_DT_GET(DT_NODELABEL(gpio0)), .pin = 2, .dt_flags = GPIO_ACTIVE_HIGH}, {.port = DEVICE_DT_GET(DT_NODELABEL(gpio0)), .pin = 28, .dt_flags = GPIO_ACTIVE_HIGH}, {.port = DEVICE_DT_GET(DT_NODELABEL(gpio0)), .pin = 15, .dt_flags = GPIO_ACTIVE_HIGH}, }

briefdescription.para: Devicetree setup for the muxer select lines.
Devicetree setup for the muxer enable pin.
Declaration of the mux controller instance.
Callback function for console input command 'select'.

detaileddescription.para:
Function select a ADC channel by call of MuxController member function selectChannel
For testing only: muxer configuration via shell command

briefdescription.para: Callback function for console input command 'enable'.

detaileddescription.para:
Function enable the muxer by call of MuxController member function enableLoad
For testing only: muxer configuration via shell command

briefdescription.para: Callback function for console input command 'status'.

detaileddescription.para:
Function print the status by call of MuxController member function printStatus
For testing only: muxer configuration via shell command

briefdescription.para: Callback function for console input command 'sweep'.

detaileddescription.para:
Function enable the muxer by calling MuxController member function enableLoad with parameter true and enters a loop over the number of configured channels. In the loop a channel is selected by call of MuxController member function selectChannel, the analog value at this channel is read by call of function adc_read, converted to milli volt by call of function adc_raw_to_millivolts and printed by call of function shell_print. Finally the function enable the muxer by calling MuxController member function enableLoad with parameter false.
For testing only: muxer configuration via shell command

memberdef.argsstring: (sub_mux, SHELL_CMD(select, NULL, "Select mux channel", cmd_mux_select), SHELL_CMD(enable, NULL, "Enable or disable load", cmd_mux_enable), SHELL_CMD(status, NULL, "Show mux status", cmd_mux_status), SHELL_CMD(sweep, NULL, "Sweep all channels [enable]", cmd_mux_sweep), SHELL_SUBCMD_SET_END)
memberdef.name: SHELL_STATIC_SUBCMD_SET_CREATE

param.type: SHELL_CMD(enable, NULL, "Enable or disable load", cmd_mux_enable)

briefdescription.para: Registration of shell commands for MUX controller tests.
Implementation of MUX controller driver class.

simplesect.para: See description in muxcontroller header file
